page.title: Connect via COM
page.description: Choose your node's serial port and Haru Client will connect right away.

serial.title: Serial connection
serial.description: Pick the COM port for your node. The current session is temporary and is not saved in your browser.

areYouSure: This will remove {{name}}. You canot undo this action.

noConnections.title: No connections yet.
noConnections.description: Create your first connection. It will connect immediately and be saved for later.

renameDescription: Enter a new name for this connection.

editConnection.title: Edit Connection
editConnection.description: Modify the settings for this connection.

toasts.checkConnection: Check your device or settings and try again
toasts.pickConnectionAgain: Could not connect. You may need to reselect the device/port.
toasts.savedCantConnect: The connection was saved but could not connect.

overlay.stuckHint: Taking longer than usual. The device may be in CLI / bootloader mode, or the firmware isn't responding to config requests.
